investment.market: Under 175.5 total points / No - Over 175.5 points scored

why_it_worked: Live total stayed inflated at 175.5 despite pace cooling before entry
Low free throw volume at entry supported under path
Los Angeles half-court offense showed assist drag and poor spacing
Indiana's early scoring profile was hot-shooting dependent and vulnerable to regression
Favorite spread markets were rejected due to turnover risk and live cover fragility

IND.C_Clark: 24 pts, 4 reb, 9 ast, 6 TOV. High usage creation supported IND scoring but turnovers kept pace uneven.
IND.K_Mitchell: 23 pts on 9-17 FG and 3-9 3PT. Main scoring support; efficient enough but 3PT rate normalized from early live window.
IND.S_Cunningham: 12 pts, 7 reb, 5-9 FG. Secondary stability without over-speeding game.
IND.A_Boston: 4 pts, 7 reb, 6 fouls. Interior scoring stayed muted, supporting under thesis.

LAS.K_Plum: 25 pts, 4 ast, 5 TOV. Primary scoring engine but turnover drag and poor team 3PT support limited total ceiling.
LAS.D_Hamby: 16 pts, 8 reb on 6-8 FG. Efficient but not enough volume to break under.
LAS.C_Brink: 11 pts, 5 reb, 3 blk off bench. Productive interior burst, but game total remained under threshold.
LAS.A_Atkins: 2 pts on 0-4 FG. Perimeter offensive drag confirmed.

postmortem_phases.phase_1_game_flow: Indiana created early separation, but scoring rhythm slowed after the live strike. LA never produced enough perimeter efficiency to force the game over.
phase_2_pivotal_moments: Live strike came with IND ahead 40-28 and total still inflated at 175.5
LA remained poor from three, finishing 2-15
Indiana's three-point shooting normalized to 30.0% by final
Boston foul trouble and low scoring kept Indiana from pushing total too high
LA turnovers and poor assist profile created empty possessions

late_risks_that_did_not_break_bet: IND/LAS combined for 46 paint points from LA and 36 from IND

phase_4_model_relevance_summary.model_alignment: Strong. The model correctly avoided spread traps and identified that the total was inflated relative to the actual pace and half-court efficiency.
future_adjustments: Keep live-total regression trigger active when early total remains high after pace cools
Continue blocking favorite spread extension with elevated turnover count
Track LA low-assist offense as under-supportive unless FT volume spikes early
